headline: Diabetic Eye Checkup in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: If you have diabetes, an annual dilated eye exam is essential -- even without symptoms.
metaDescription: Diabetic eye checkup and diabetic retinopathy screening in KK Nagar, Chennai with Dr. Rajeswari. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Early Detection, Before Vision Is Affected
whyPatientsChoose.description: Diabetic eye damage is most treatable before you'd ever notice symptoms -- that's exactly when we look for it.

symptoms: You have Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, any duration
Over a year since your last dilated eye exam
Any blurring, floaters, or vision changes
Blood sugar has been difficult to control

processSteps.title: Dilated Examination
processSteps.description: A thorough look at the retina to catch silent, early-stage changes.

processSteps.title: Retinal Imaging
processSteps.description: Precise documentation to track any changes over time.

processSteps.title: Proactive Management
processSteps.description: Catching diabetic retinopathy early, when it's most treatable.
